rationale: The 3 items flagged as open in the first VALIDATE pass were resolved by explicit user decision this session: (1) admin/super_admin web-console-access gap — user chose to ship ADM-011 as-is and deferred the fix to a filed follow-up (backlog note adm-011-admin-invite-no-web-access_NOTE_21-07-26.md, tracked as issue #142); accepted as a documented Known-Gap, does not block EXECUTE. (2) Mobile invite-accept.tsx navigation-race flash — accepted as an Agent-Probe check (no data-integrity or security defect; consume call always completes correctly regardless of the transient UI flash) — owed post-EXECUTE, does not block EXECUTE. (3) No bespoke rate limit on /staff-invite/start — user REJECTED accepting this as a residual and directed a fix; the fix was supplemented into the plan (Section D item 9, IP-keyed 10 req/min fixed-window limiter, new Fully-Automated test gate) and re-validated this pass — design confirmed sound (correct req.ip semantics given no trust-proxy config, generic 429 body, honest per-process/in-memory documentation, correct route-specific application avoiding /consume). One new, non-blocking test-isolation finding from this pass (shared in-memory limiter state across test cases in the same integration test file) was resolved via a Plan Update (test-only reset hook + execute-agent instruction), not left open. Privilege-grant integrity (super_admin-only enforcement, invitee cannot supply own role/branch, atomic single-use consume, hashed token at rest, 7-day expiry, current-role re-check at consume) remains independently source-verified correct from the first VALIDATE pass — see verification.json and adversarial-validation.json, unchanged by this re-validate. Net gate: PASS.
